_comment: CTO Config Template - Copy to cto-config.json and customize for your project
_comment_org_name: Organization name used to construct agent GitHub App names (e.g., 'Acme' -> 'Acme-Rex', 'Acme-Blaze')
_comment_mcp_servers: MCP servers available to all TypeScript agents for AI-assisted implementation

better-auth.description: Better Auth MCP server for AI-assisted authentication implementation

context7.description: Library documentation lookup (configured via platform tools-server)

defaults._comment_docs: Default values for docs() tool - documentation generation workflows
defaults._comment_code: Default values for task() tool - code implementation workflows
defaults._comment_intake: Default values for intake() tool - project intake workflows
defaults._comment_play: Default values for play() tool - playground test workflows. Agent names are hardcoded (Rex, Blaze, Grizz, Nova, Tap, Spark, Bolt, Cleo, Cipher, Tess) but can be overridden.
defaults._comment_acp: Shared ACP defaults for sessionful runtimes and internal service integrations. Stakpak is the default ACP-capable runtime entry.

play._comment_cursor_improvements: Cursor-inspired: fresh start clears context after N retries to combat drift

rex._comment_subagents: Enable parallel subagent execution (Claude Code only)

_field_documentation.orgName: Organization name used to construct agent GitHub App names. Agent names are built as '{orgName}-{AgentSuffix}' (e.g., 'Acme' -> 'Acme-Rex', 'Acme-Blaze'). Defaults to '5DLabs'.
_field_documentation.defaults.docs.model: Claude model for documentation generation (e.g., claude-opus-4-1-20250805, claude-sonnet-4-20250514, or opus/sonnet for CLAUDE code)
_field_documentation.defaults.docs.githubApp: Default GitHub App for docs workflows
_field_documentation.defaults.docs.includeCodebase: Whether to include existing codebase as markdown context
_field_documentation.defaults.docs.sourceBranch: Default source branch to work from
_field_documentation.defaults.code.model: Model for code implementation CLI (e.g., claude-opus-4-7-20260610 or claude-sonnet-4-20250514). Codex/OpenAI defaults removed: this environment has no OPENAI_API_KEY.
_field_documentation.defaults.code.githubApp: Default GitHub App for code workflows
_field_documentation.defaults.code.continueSession: Whether to continue a previous CLI session by default
_field_documentation.defaults.code.workingDirectory: Default working directory within repository (. for root)
_field_documentation.defaults.code.overwriteMemory: Whether to overwrite the CLI memory file (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md) by default
_field_documentation.defaults.code.repository: Default target repository URL (where code gets implemented)
_field_documentation.defaults.code.docsRepository: Default documentation repository URL (where Task Master docs are stored)
_field_documentation.defaults.code.docsProjectDirectory: Default project directory within docs repository
_field_documentation.defaults.code.service: Default service name for workspace isolation (creates workspace-{service} PVC)
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.local: Run intake locally using tasks CLI instead of submitting Argo workflow (default: false)
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.autoAssignMorgan: Auto-assign Morgan to the PRD issue to start intake workflow immediately (default: true). Set to false to review/edit cto-config first.
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.models.tiers: Model tiers for intake pipeline steps. Each tier has {provider, model}. primary=core analysis, fast=artifact generation, frontier=critical decisions
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.models.committee: Array of 5 {provider, model} pairs for the voting committee. Uses diverse models across providers to maximize perspective diversity
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.deepResearch: Deep research configuration for autonomous web investigation during intake
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.deepResearch.enabled: Enable deep research using Firecrawl Agent for competitive analysis and pattern discovery (default: true)
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.deepResearch.maxCredits: Maximum Firecrawl credits to spend per research task (default: 50). Controls cost of autonomous web research.
_field_documentation.defaults.intake.deepResearch.triggers: Keywords that trigger deep research - when found in PRD, agent will use Firecrawl Agent for investigation
_field_documentation.defaults.acp: Workspace-wide ACP defaults, runtime registry, and internal caller policy
_field_documentation.defaults.acp.runtimes: Registered ACP runtimes keyed by ID. Stakpak should be added here as `stakpak acp`.
_field_documentation.defaults.acp.services: Per-service ACP enablement and runtime allowlists for healer, pm, controller, mcp, and mcpLite
_field_documentation.defaults.acp.server: Internal ACP server bind/auth defaults for services that expose ACP back to OpenClaw
_field_documentation.defaults.play.agentCommunication: Agent-to-agent communication mode: 'subagent' (OpenClaw /hooks/agent) or 'a2a' (HTTP JSON-RPC). Deprecated alias: 'acp'. Default: 'subagent'
_field_documentation.defaults.play.service: Default service name for play workspace isolation
_field_documentation.defaults.play.maxRetries: Default maximum retry attempts for all agents (can be overridden per agent)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.implementationMaxRetries: Maximum retry attempts for implementation agent (Rex/Blaze)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.frontendMaxRetries: Maximum retry attempts for frontend agent (Blaze)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.qualityMaxRetries: Maximum retry attempts for quality agent (Cleo)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.securityMaxRetries: Maximum retry attempts for security agent (Cipher)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.testingMaxRetries: Maximum retry attempts for testing agent (Tess)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.autoMerge: Whether Tess should automatically merge PRs after approval (true/false)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.parallelExecution: Whether to run independent tasks in parallel (true/false)
_field_documentation.defaults.play.healerEndpoint: Healer API endpoint for session notifications - enables real-time Play monitoring (e.g., 'http://localhost:8083' for local, 'http://cto-healer-play-api:8083' for cluster)
_field_documentation.agents: Agent configurations with tool profiles - each agent has githubApp, cli, model, and tools configuration including remote tools and local server access
_field_documentation.agents.*.features.effectSolutions: Enable Effect.ts integration - includes effect-solutions CLI instructions in agent prompts for idiomatic Effect TypeScript patterns
_field_documentation.agents.blaze.frontendStack: Frontend stack selection: 'shadcn' (default) for Next.js + shadcn/ui, or 'tanstack' for TanStack Router + DB + Query ecosystem. Affects which patterns Blaze uses for routing, data fetching, and UI components
_field_documentation.agents.*.subagents: Subagent configuration for parallel subtask execution (works with cli: 'claude' or 'opencode')
_field_documentation.agents.*.subagents.enabled: Enable subagent parallel execution - when true, agent acts as coordinator and dispatches subtasks to parallel workers. Default: false (single agent mode)
_field_documentation.agents.*.subagents.maxConcurrent: Maximum concurrent subagents (1-10, default 5) - Claude Code supports up to 10, OpenCode configurable per agent
